    def calculate_column(self):
        try:
            section_name = self.column_section_var.get()
            all_sections = {**H_BEAMS, **I_BEAMS, **STEEL_PIPES}
            if section_name not in all_sections:
                raise ValueError(f"а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё” {section_name}")
            section = all_sections[section_name]
            
            height = self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_height_entry, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаё№аёҮа№ҖаёӘаёІ")
            Kx = self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_kx_entry, "Kx")
            Ky = self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_ky_entry, "Ky")
            
            loads = ColumnLoad(
                axial_load_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_axial_dl_entry, "Axial DL"),
                axial_load_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_axial_ll_entry, "Axial LL"),
                axial_load_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_axial_wl_entry, "Axial WL"),
                moment_x_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_mx_dl_entry, "Mx DL"),
                moment_x_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_mx_ll_entry, "Mx LL"),
                moment_x_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_mx_wl_entry, "Mx WL"),
                moment_y_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_my_dl_entry, "My DL"),
                moment_y_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_my_ll_entry, "My LL"),
                moment_y_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_my_wl_entry, "My WL"),
            )
            
            design = ColumnDesign(section=section, height=height, Kx=Kx, Ky=Ky)
            result = design.check_combined_loading(loads)
            result.Fy = section.Fy

            # Store for PDF export
            self._column_result = result
            self._column_section_name = section_name
            self._column_height = height

            report = format_column_report(result, section_name, height)

            self.column_results_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.column_results_text.insert(tk.END, report)

            status = "аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ" if result.is_ok else "а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ"
            self.status_var.set(f"Column: {status} - {section_name}")
            
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror("аёӮа№үаёӯаёңаёҙаё”аёһаёҘаёІаё”", str(e))
    
    def find_column_section(self):
        try:
            height = self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_height_entry, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёӘаё№аёҮа№ҖаёӘаёІ")
            Kx = self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_kx_entry, "Kx")
            Ky = self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_ky_entry, "Ky")
            
            loads = ColumnLoad(
                axial_load_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_axial_dl_entry, "Axial DL"),
                axial_load_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_axial_ll_entry, "Axial LL"),
                axial_load_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_axial_wl_entry, "Axial WL"),
                moment_x_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_mx_dl_entry, "Mx DL"),
                moment_x_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_mx_ll_entry, "Mx LL"),
                moment_x_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_mx_wl_entry, "Mx WL"),
                moment_y_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_my_dl_entry, "My DL"),
                moment_y_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_my_ll_entry, "My LL"),
                moment_y_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.column_my_wl_entry, "My WL"),
            )
            
            all_sections = {**H_BEAMS, **I_BEAMS, **STEEL_PIPES}
            sorted_sections = sorted(all_sections.keys(), key=lambda k: all_sections[k].weight)
            found = None
            
            self.column_results_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.column_results_text.insert(tk.END, "аёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаё„а№үаёҷаё«аёІаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё”аё—аёөа№ҲаёӣаёЈаё°аё«аёўаёұаё”аё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёёаё”...\n\n")
            
            for section_name in sorted_sections:
                section = all_sections[section_name]
                self.column_results_text.insert(tk.END, f"аё•аёЈаё§аёҲаёӘаёӯаёҡ: {section_name}...")
                self.master.update_idletasks()
                
                design = ColumnDesign(section=section, height=height, Kx=Kx, Ky=Ky)
                result = design.check_combined_loading(loads)
                
                if result.is_ok:
                    self.column_results_text.insert(tk.END, " аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ\n")
                    found = section_name
                    report = format_column_report(result, section_name, height)
                    self.column_results_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
                    self.column_results_text.insert(tk.END, report)
                    self.column_section_var.set(found)
                    self.status_var.set(f"аёһаёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё”аёӣаёЈаё°аё«аёўаёұаё”аёӘаёёаё”: {found}")
                    break
                else:
                    self.column_results_text.insert(tk.END, " а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ\n")
            
            if not found:
                self.column_results_text.insert(tk.END, "\nа№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё”аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаё«аёЎаёІаё°аёӘаёЎ")
                messagebox.showwarning("а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡ", "а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё”аё—аёөа№Ҳа№Җаё«аёЎаёІаё°аёӘаёЎа№ғаёҷаёҗаёІаёҷаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ")
                
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror("аёӮа№үаёӯаёңаёҙаё”аёһаёҘаёІаё”", str(e))

    def calculate_bolted(self):
        try:
            bolt_name = self.bolt_grade_var.get()
            bolt = BOLTS[bolt_name]
            num_bolts = int(self.get_float_from_entry(self.num_bolts_entry, "аёҲаёіаёҷаё§аёҷ bolts"))
            shear_planes = 1 if "Single" in self.shear_planes_var.get() else 2
            plate_thickness = self.get_float_from_entry(self.plate_thickness_entry, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё«аёҷаёІа№Ғаёңа№Ҳаёҷ")
            edge_distance = self.get_float_from_entry(self.edge_distance_entry, "аёЈаё°аёўаё°аёӮаёӯаёҡ")
            
            loads = ConnectionLoad(
                shear_load_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.bolt_shear_dl_entry, "Shear DL"),
                shear_load_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.bolt_shear_ll_entry, "Shear LL"),
                shear_load_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.bolt_shear_wl_entry, "Shear WL"),
            )
            
            design = BoltedConnectionDesign(
                bolt=bolt, connected_plate_thickness=plate_thickness,
                edge_distance=edge_distance
            )
            result = design.check_connection(loads, num_bolts, shear_planes)
            report = format_bolted_report(result)
            
            self.bolted_results_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.bolted_results_text.insert(tk.END, report)
            
            status = "аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ" if result.is_ok else "а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ"
            self.status_var.set(f"Bolted: {status}")
            
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror("аёӮа№үаёӯаёңаёҙаё”аёһаёҘаёІаё”", str(e))
    
    def calculate_welded(self):
        try:
            weld_name = self.weld_electrode_var.get()
            weld = WELDS[weld_name]
            weld_size = self.get_float_from_entry(self.weld_size_entry, "аёӮаёҷаёІаё”аёЈаёӯаёўа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎ")
            weld_length = self.get_float_from_entry(self.weld_length_entry, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёўаёІаё§аёЈаёӯаёўа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎ")
            
            loads = ConnectionLoad(
                shear_load_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.weld_shear_dl_entry, "Shear DL"),
                shear_load_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.weld_shear_ll_entry, "Shear LL"),
                shear_load_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.weld_shear_wl_entry, "Shear WL"),
            )
            
            design = WeldedConnectionDesign(weld=weld)
            result = design.check_connection(loads, weld_size, weld_length)
            report = format_welded_report(result)
            
            self.welded_results_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.welded_results_text.insert(tk.END, report)
            
            status = "аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ" if result.is_ok else "а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ"
            self.status_var.set(f"Welded: {status}")
            
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror("аёӮа№үаёӯаёңаёҙаё”аёһаёҘаёІаё”", str(e))
    
    # ========================================================================
    # BASE PLATE TAB
    # ========================================================================
    def create_baseplate_tab(self):
        self.baseplate_tab = ttk.Frame(self.notebook)
        self.notebook.add(self.baseplate_tab, text='а№Ғаёңа№ҲаёҷаёҗаёІаёҷ (Base Plate)')
        
        canvas = tk.Canvas(self.baseplate_tab)
        scrollbar = ttk.Scrollbar(self.baseplate_tab, orient="vertical", command=canvas.yview)
        scrollable_frame = ttk.Frame(canvas)
        
        scrollable_frame.bind("<Configure>", lambda e: canvas.configure(scrollregion=canvas.bbox("all")))
        canvas.create_window((0, 0), window=scrollable_frame, anchor="nw")
        canvas.configure(yscrollcommand=scrollbar.set)
        
        # Input frame
        input_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(scrollable_frame, text="аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаёҷаёіа№ҖаёӮа№үаёІ - Base Plate Design")
        input_frame.grid(row=0, column=0, padx=10, pady=10, sticky="nsew")
        input_frame.grid_columnconfigure(1, weight=1)
        
        row = 0
        self.baseplate_section_var = tk.StringVar()
        self.baseplate_section_combo = self.create_combo_box(
            input_frame, "аё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё”а№ҖаёӘаёІ:", row, 
            list(H_BEAMS.keys()) + list(I_BEAMS.keys()), "H250x250x9x14"
        )
        row += 1
        
        ttk.Label(input_frame, text="--- Base Plate Dimensions (mm) ---").grid(row=row, column=0, columnspan=2, pady=5)
        row += 1
        self.baseplate_width_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҒаё§а№үаёІаёҮ B (mm):", row, "400.0")
        row += 1
        self.baseplate_length_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёўаёІаё§ N (mm):", row, "400.0")
        row += 1
        self.baseplate_thickness_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё«аёҷаёІ tp (mm):", row, "25.0")
        row += 1
        
        self.concrete_fc_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "аёҒаёіаёҘаёұаёҮаё„аёӯаёҷаёҒаёЈаёөаё• f'c (MPa):", row, "24.0")
        row += 1
        
        ttk.Label(input_frame, text="--- Loads ---").grid(row=row, column=0, columnspan=2, pady=5)
        row += 1
        self.baseplate_axial_dl_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "Axial DL (kN):", row, "800.0")
        row += 1
        self.baseplate_axial_ll_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "Axial LL (kN):", row, "500.0")
        row += 1
        self.baseplate_axial_wl_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "Axial WL (kN):", row, "0.0")
        row += 1
        
        self.baseplate_mx_dl_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "Mx DL (kN-m):", row, "0.0")
        row += 1
        self.baseplate_mx_ll_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "Mx LL (kN-m):", row, "0.0")
        row += 1
        self.baseplate_mx_wl_entry = self.create_entry_field(input_frame, "Mx WL (kN-m):", row, "0.0")
        
        # Buttons
        button_frame = ttk.Frame(scrollable_frame)
        button_frame.grid(row=1, column=0, padx=10, pady=10)
        ttk.Button(button_frame, text="аё„аёіаёҷаё§аё“а№Ғаёңа№ҲаёҷаёҗаёІаёҷ (Calculate)", command=self.calculate_baseplate).pack(side=tk.LEFT, padx=5)
        
        # Output
        output_frame = ttk.LabelFrame(scrollable_frame, text="аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ң - Base Plate Results")
        output_frame.grid(row=2, column=0, padx=10, pady=10, sticky="nsew")
        output_frame.grid_columnconfigure(0, weight=1)
        
        self.baseplate_results_text = tk.Text(output_frame, wrap="word", height=20, font=('Consolas', 11))
        self.baseplate_results_text.grid(row=0, column=0, padx=5, pady=5, sticky="nsew")
        
        bp_scrollbar = ttk.Scrollbar(output_frame, orient="vertical", command=self.baseplate_results_text.yview)
        bp_scrollbar.grid(row=0, column=1, sticky="ns")
        self.baseplate_results_text.config(yscrollcommand=bp_scrollbar.set)
        
        canvas.pack(side="left", fill="both", expand=True)
        scrollbar.pack(side="right", fill="y")
    
    def calculate_baseplate(self):
        try:
            section_name = self.baseplate_section_var.get()
            all_sections = {**H_BEAMS, **I_BEAMS}
            if section_name not in all_sections:
                raise ValueError(f"а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё” {section_name}")
            section = all_sections[section_name]
            
            B = self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_width_entry, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёҒаё§а№үаёІаёҮ B")
            N = self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_length_entry, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаёўаёІаё§ N")
            tp = self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_thickness_entry, "аё„аё§аёІаёЎаё«аёҷаёІ tp")
            fc = self.get_float_from_entry(self.concrete_fc_entry, "f'c")
            
            loads = BasePlateLoad(
                axial_load_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_axial_dl_entry, "Axial DL"),
                axial_load_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_axial_ll_entry, "Axial LL"),
                axial_load_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_axial_wl_entry, "Axial WL"),
                moment_x_D=self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_mx_dl_entry, "Mx DL"),
                moment_x_L=self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_mx_ll_entry, "Mx LL"),
                moment_x_W=self.get_float_from_entry(self.baseplate_mx_wl_entry, "Mx WL"),
            )
            
            design = BasePlateDesign(
                section=section, plate_width=B, plate_length=N,
                plate_thickness=tp, concrete_Fc=fc
            )
            result = design.check_base_plate(loads)
            report = format_baseplate_report(result, section_name)
            
            self.baseplate_results_text.delete(1.0, tk.END)
            self.baseplate_results_text.insert(tk.END, report)
            
            status = "аёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ" if result.is_ok else "а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёңа№ҲаёІаёҷ"
            self.status_var.set(f"Base Plate: {status}")
            
        except Exception as e:
            messagebox.showerror("аёӮа№үаёӯаёңаёҙаё”аёһаёҘаёІаё”", str(e))


# ============================================================================
# MAIN EXECUTION
# ============================================================================
if __name__ == "__main__":
    root = tk.Tk()
    app = SteelStructureDesignApp(root)
    root.mainloop()

"""
Netlify Serverless Function вҖ” Steel Structure Design Calculator
Returns structured calculation steps for formula display + JSON results.
"""
import json
import sys
import os
import math
from unittest.mock import MagicMock

# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Mock GUI/plotting libraries before importing project modules
# --------------------------------------------------------------------------
_GUI_MOCKS = [
    'tkinter', 'tkinter.ttk', 'tkinter.messagebox', 'tkinter.filedialog',
    'matplotlib', 'matplotlib.figure', 'matplotlib.backends',
    'matplotlib.backends.backend_tkagg',
    'reportlab', 'reportlab.lib', 'reportlab.lib.pagesizes',
    'reportlab.platypus', 'reportlab.lib.styles', 'reportlab.lib.units',
    'reportlab.pdfbase', 'reportlab.pdfbase.pdfmetrics',
    'reportlab.pdfbase.ttfonts',
]
for _m in _GUI_MOCKS:
    sys.modules[_m] = MagicMock()

_ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
if _ROOT not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, _ROOT)

from purlin import (PurlinDesign, STEEL_SECTIONS as PURLIN_SECTIONS,
                    format_detailed_report,
                    ALLOWABLE_BENDING_STRESS_FACTOR_X,
                    ALLOWABLE_BENDING_STRESS_FACTOR_Y,
                    ALLOWABLE_SHEAR_STRESS_FACTOR,
                    LIVE_LOAD_DEFLECTION_LIMIT_RATIO,
                    TOTAL_LOAD_DEFLECTION_LIMIT_RATIO,
                    E_STEEL as PURLIN_E, KPA_TO_PA, MPA_TO_PA, G)
from beam_design import BeamDesign, BeamLoad, E_STEEL as BEAM_E
from column_design import ColumnDesign, ColumnLoad, E_STEEL as COL_E, PI
from connection_design import BoltedConnectionDesign, WeldedConnectionDesign, ConnectionLoad

"""
Netlify Serverless Function вҖ” PDF Report Generator
POST /api/export-pdf
Body: { module, data, project }
Returns: application/pdf binary
"""
import base64
import json
import os
import sys
from unittest.mock import MagicMock

# в”Җв”Җ Bootstrap path в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
_ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
if _ROOT not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, _ROOT)

# Mock only GUI/plotting вҖ” NOT reportlab (we need it for PDF)
_GUI_MOCKS = [
    'tkinter', 'tkinter.ttk', 'tkinter.messagebox', 'tkinter.filedialog',
    'matplotlib', 'matplotlib.figure', 'matplotlib.backends',
    'matplotlib.backends.backend_tkagg',
]
for _m in _GUI_MOCKS:
    if _m not in sys.modules:
        sys.modules[_m] = MagicMock()

from report_generator import (
    generate_beam_report, generate_column_report,
    generate_combined_report, ProjectInfo,
)
from beam_design import BeamDesign, BeamLoad
from column_design import ColumnDesign, ColumnLoad
from steel_sections import H_BEAMS, I_BEAMS, STEEL_PIPES, C_CHANNELS, RHS_SECTIONS


def _get_section(name: str):
    for db in (H_BEAMS, I_BEAMS, STEEL_PIPES, C_CHANNELS, RHS_SECTIONS):
        if name in db:
            return db[name]
    raise ValueError(f"а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё”: {name}")


def _project_from_dict(d: dict) -> ProjectInfo:
    return ProjectInfo(
        project_name=d.get("project_name", "а№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ"),
        project_no=d.get("project_no", ""),
        engineer=d.get("engineer", ""),
        checker=d.get("checker", ""),
        client=d.get("client", ""),
        location=d.get("location", ""),
    )


def handler(event, context):
    """Netlify function handler."""
    try:
        body = json.loads(event.get("body") or "{}")
        module  = body.get("module", "")
        data    = body.get("data", {})
        project = _project_from_dict(body.get("project", {}))

        pdf_bytes = None

        if module == "beam":
            section_name = data.get("section_name", "")
            span         = float(data.get("span", 6.0))
            sec          = _get_section(section_name)

            loads = BeamLoad(
                dead_load=float(data.get("dead_load", 0)),
                live_load=float(data.get("live_load", 0)),
                wind_load=float(data.get("wind_load", 0)),
                point_load_D=float(data.get("point_load_D", 0)),
                point_load_L=float(data.get("point_load_L", 0)),
            )
            bd = BeamDesign(
                section=sec, span=span,
                lateral_bracing=data.get("lateral_bracing", "continuous"),
                deflection_type=data.get("deflection_type", "beam_live_load"),
            )
            result = bd.check_beam(loads)
            result.details["properties"]["Ix"] = sec.Ix
            pdf_bytes = generate_beam_report(result, section_name, span, project)

        elif module == "column":
            section_name = data.get("section_name", "")
            height       = float(data.get("height", 4.0))
            sec          = _get_section(section_name)

            loads = ColumnLoad(
                axial_load_D=float(data.get("axial_load_D", 0)),
                axial_load_L=float(data.get("axial_load_L", 0)),
                axial_load_W=float(data.get("axial_load_W", 0)),
                moment_x_D=float(data.get("moment_x_D", 0)),
                moment_x_L=float(data.get("moment_x_L", 0)),
                moment_x_W=float(data.get("moment_x_W", 0)),
                moment_y_D=float(data.get("moment_y_D", 0)),
                moment_y_L=float(data.get("moment_y_L", 0)),
                moment_y_W=float(data.get("moment_y_W", 0)),
            )
            cd = ColumnDesign(
                section=sec, height=height,
                Kx=float(data.get("Kx", 1.0)),
                Ky=float(data.get("Ky", 1.0)),
            )
            result = cd.check_combined_loading(loads)
            result.Fy = sec.Fy
            pdf_bytes = generate_column_report(result, section_name, height, project)

        else:
            return {
                "statusCode": 400,
                "body": json.dumps({"error": f"module '{module}' а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡ PDF export"}),
            }

        # Return PDF as base64 (Netlify functions require base64 for binary)
        return {
            "statusCode": 200,
            "headers": {
                "Content-Type": "application/pdf",
                "Content-Disposition": f'attachment; filename="calculation_{module}.pdf"',
            },
            "body": base64.b64encode(pdf_bytes).decode("utf-8"),
            "isBase64Encoded": True,
        }

    except Exception as exc:
        return {
            "statusCode": 500,
            "body": json.dumps({"error": str(exc)}),
        }

"""
import base64
import json
import os
import sys
from unittest.mock import MagicMock

# в”Җв”Җ Bootstrap path в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
_ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))))
if _ROOT not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, _ROOT)

# Mock only GUI/plotting вҖ” NOT reportlab (we need it for PDF)
_GUI_MOCKS = [
    'tkinter', 'tkinter.ttk', 'tkinter.messagebox', 'tkinter.filedialog',
    'matplotlib', 'matplotlib.figure', 'matplotlib.backends',
    'matplotlib.backends.backend_tkagg',
]
for _m in _GUI_MOCKS:
    if _m not in sys.modules:
        sys.modules[_m] = MagicMock()

from report_generator import (
    generate_beam_report, generate_column_report,
    generate_combined_report, ProjectInfo,
)
from beam_design import BeamDesign, BeamLoad
from column_design import ColumnDesign, ColumnLoad
from steel_sections import H_BEAMS, I_BEAMS, STEEL_PIPES, C_CHANNELS, RHS_SECTIONS


def _get_section(name: str):
    for db in (H_BEAMS, I_BEAMS, STEEL_PIPES, C_CHANNELS, RHS_SECTIONS):
        if name in db:
            return db[name]
    raise ValueError(f"а№„аёЎа№Ҳаёһаёҡаё«аёҷа№үаёІаё•аёұаё”: {name}")


def _project_from_dict(d: dict) -> ProjectInfo:
    return ProjectInfo(
        project_name=d.get("project_name", "а№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ"),
        project_no=d.get("project_no", ""),
        engineer=d.get("engineer", ""),
        checker=d.get("checker", ""),
        client=d.get("client", ""),
        location=d.get("location", ""),
    )


def handler(event, context):
    """Netlify function handler."""
    try:
        body = json.loads(event.get("body") or "{}")
        module  = body.get("module", "")
        data    = body.get("data", {})
        project = _project_from_dict(body.get("project", {}))

        pdf_bytes = None

        if module == "beam":
            section_name = data.get("section_name", "")
            span         = float(data.get("span", 6.0))
            sec          = _get_section(section_name)

            loads = BeamLoad(
                dead_load=float(data.get("dead_load", 0)),
                live_load=float(data.get("live_load", 0)),
                wind_load=float(data.get("wind_load", 0)),
                point_load_D=float(data.get("point_load_D", 0)),
                point_load_L=float(data.get("point_load_L", 0)),
            )
            bd = BeamDesign(
                section=sec, span=span,
                lateral_bracing=data.get("lateral_bracing", "continuous"),
                deflection_type=data.get("deflection_type", "beam_live_load"),
            )
            result = bd.check_beam(loads)
            result.details["properties"]["Ix"] = sec.Ix
            pdf_bytes = generate_beam_report(result, section_name, span, project)

        elif module == "column":
            section_name = data.get("section_name", "")
            height       = float(data.get("height", 4.0))
            sec          = _get_section(section_name)

            loads = ColumnLoad(
                axial_load_D=float(data.get("axial_load_D", 0)),
                axial_load_L=float(data.get("axial_load_L", 0)),
                axial_load_W=float(data.get("axial_load_W", 0)),
                moment_x_D=float(data.get("moment_x_D", 0)),
                moment_x_L=float(data.get("moment_x_L", 0)),
                moment_x_W=float(data.get("moment_x_W", 0)),
                moment_y_D=float(data.get("moment_y_D", 0)),
                moment_y_L=float(data.get("moment_y_L", 0)),
                moment_y_W=float(data.get("moment_y_W", 0)),
            )
            cd = ColumnDesign(
                section=sec, height=height,
                Kx=float(data.get("Kx", 1.0)),
                Ky=float(data.get("Ky", 1.0)),
            )
            result = cd.check_combined_loading(loads)
            result.Fy = sec.Fy
            pdf_bytes = generate_column_report(result, section_name, height, project)

        else:
            return {
                "statusCode": 400,
                "body": json.dumps({"error": f"module '{module}' а№„аёЎа№ҲаёЈаёӯаёҮаёЈаёұаёҡ PDF export"}),
            }

        # Return PDF as base64 (Netlify functions require base64 for binary)
        return {
            "statusCode": 200,
            "headers": {
                "Content-Type": "application/pdf",
                "Content-Disposition": f'attachment; filename="calculation_{module}.pdf"',
            },
            "body": base64.b64encode(pdf_bytes).decode("utf-8"),
            "isBase64Encoded": True,
        }

    except Exception as exc:
        return {
            "statusCode": 500,
            "body": json.dumps({"error": str(exc)}),
        }

Commit а№ҒаёҘаё° push аёӘаёіа№ҖаёЈа№ҮаёҲ вҖ” **Preview Panel** а№ҒаёӘаё”аёҮ modal "аёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ" аёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ Export PDF

---

## аёӘаёЈаёёаёӣаёӘаёҙа№ҲаёҮаё—аёөа№ҲаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮ

### `report_generator.py` вҖ” PDF Engine аё«аёҘаёұаёҒ
| аёӯаёҮаё„а№ҢаёӣаёЈаё°аёҒаёӯаёҡ | аёЈаёІаёўаёҘаё°а№Җаёӯаёөаёўаё” |
|---|---|
| Font | ArialUnicode (Thai + аёӯаёұаёҮаёҒаёӨаё©) аёҡаёҷ Windows |
| Layout | A4, margin 20mm, header/footer аё—аёёаёҒаё«аёҷа№үаёІаёһаёЈа№үаёӯаёЎа№ҖаёҘаёӮаё«аёҷа№үаёІ |
| Cover page | аёҠаё·а№Ҳаёӯа№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ, а№ҖаёҘаёӮаё—аёөа№Ҳ, аё§аёұаёҷаё—аёөа№Ҳ, аё§аёҙаёЁаё§аёҒаёЈ, аёңаё№а№үаё•аёЈаё§аёҲ, аёЎаёІаё•аёЈаёҗаёІаёҷ |
| Formula table | 4 col: **аё•аёұаё§а№ҒаёӣаёЈ \| аёӘаё№аё•аёЈ \| а№Ғаё—аёҷаё„а№ҲаёІ \| аёңаёҘаёҘаёұаёһаёҳа№Ң** |
| Pass/Fail | аёӘаёөа№ҖаёӮаёөаёўаё§/а№Ғаё”аёҮ аё—аёұа№үаёҮа№Ғаё–аё§а№ҒаёҘаё° banner аёӮаёҷаёІаё”а№ғаё«аёҚа№Ҳ |
| **Beam report** | Properties вҶ’ Load combos вҶ’ Bending вҶ’ Shear вҶ’ Deflection вҶ’ Summary |
| **Column report** | Properties вҶ’ Slenderness (KL/r, Cc) вҶ’ Fa вҶ’ Combined вҶ’ Summary |
| Combined report | аё«аёҘаёІаёў member а№ғаёҷ PDF а№Җаё”аёөаёўаё§ |

### аёҒаёІаёЈа№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯ
- **Tkinter** (`main_app.py`): аёӣаёёа№ҲаёЎ "Export PDF" вҶ’ dialog аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘа№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёҒаёІаёЈ вҶ’ `filedialog.asksaveasfilename` вҶ’ аёҡаёұаёҷаё—аё¶аёҒ PDF
- **Web** (`public/index.html`): аёӣаёёа№ҲаёЎ Export PDF вҶ’ modal аёҒаёЈаёӯаёҒаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘ вҶ’ POST `/api/export-pdf` вҶ’ download PDF аёӯаёұаё•а№ӮаёҷаёЎаёұаё•аёҙ (fallback: `window.print()`)
- **Netlify** (`netlify/functions/export_pdf.py`): serverless function аёЈаёұаёҡ JSON вҶ’ аё„аёіаёҷаё§аё“аёӢа№үаёі вҶ’ аёӘа№ҲаёҮаё„аё·аёҷ PDF binary (base64)

content.thinking:
The error is "Failed to parse URL from /.netlify/functions/calculate" - this is a URL parsing issue. The API endpoint is set as a relative URL `/.netlify/functions/calculate` but when running locally (not on Netlify), this URL doesn't resolve properly.

Let me check the current API URL in the JavaScript code.

input.command: grep -n "API\|fetch\|netlify/functions\|localhost" "C:\Code_design\Purlin_Disign\public\index.html" | head -20
input.description: Find API URL definition in index.html

content.thinking:
The issue is that the `index.html` is being opened as a local file (`file://...`) rather than being served from a web server. When opened as a `file://` URL, relative URLs like `/.netlify/functions/calculate` fail to parse properly.

The problem is that `/.netlify/functions/calculate` is a valid URL when served from Netlify or a local server, but when opened as a `file://C:/...` URL, it fails because:
1. For `file://` protocol, `/.netlify/functions/calculate` would try to be `file:///netlify/functions/calculate` which doesn't exist


2. The fetch API can't resolve the relative path `/` when there's no HTTP base URL to anchor it to.

The real solution is environment detectionвҖ”I need to check whether the app is running as a file, on localhost, or deployed to Netlify, then route to the appropriate endpoint accordingly. For local development, I'd point to a Python server running on a specific port, while production would use the Netlify function path.

The cleanest approach is creating a local Python server that handles both static file serving and API requests, eliminating the need for complex URL detection logic. I'm setting up a server that serves the HTML from the public directory and proxies API calls to the calculate function, all running on a single port. """
Local Development Server
аёЈаёұаёҷ: python local_server.py
а№Җаёӣаёҙаё”а№ҖаёҡаёЈаёІаё§а№Ңа№ҖаёӢаёӯаёЈа№Ң: http://localhost:8888
"""
import json
import os
import sys
from http.server import HTTPServer, SimpleHTTPRequestHandler
from unittest.mock import MagicMock

# в”Җв”Җ Bootstrap в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
ROOT = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

for _m in ['tkinter', 'tkinter.ttk', 'tkinter.messagebox', 'tkinter.filedialog',
           'matplotlib', 'matplotlib.figure', 'matplotlib.backends',
           'matplotlib.backends.backend_tkagg']:
    sys.modules[_m] = MagicMock()

if ROOT not in sys.path:
    sys.path.insert(0, ROOT)

# Import function handlers (lazy вҖ” imported once at startup)
from netlify.functions.calculate import handler as _calc_handler
from netlify.functions.export_pdf import handler as _pdf_handler


# в”Җв”Җ Request handler в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

class Handler(SimpleHTTPRequestHandler):
    """Serves static files from public/ and routes /api/* to Python handlers."""

    def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs):
        super().__init__(*args, directory=os.path.join(ROOT, "public"), **kwargs)

    def log_message(self, fmt, *args):
        print(f"  {self.address_string()} {fmt % args}")

    def do_POST(self):
        path = self.path.split("?")[0]
        if path in ("/api/calculate", "/.netlify/functions/calculate"):
            self._proxy(_calc_handler)
        elif path in ("/api/export-pdf", "/.netlify/functions/export_pdf"):
            self._proxy(_pdf_handler)
        else:
            self.send_error(404, f"Unknown endpoint: {path}")

    def _proxy(self, handler_fn):
        """Read body, call handler, write response."""
        length = int(self.headers.get("Content-Length", 0))
        body   = self.rfile.read(length).decode("utf-8") if length else ""

        event   = {"body": body, "httpMethod": "POST",
                   "headers": dict(self.headers)}
        context = {}

        try:
            result = handler_fn(event, context)
        except Exception as exc:
            result = {"statusCode": 500,
                      "body": json.dumps({"error": str(exc)})}

        status  = result.get("statusCode", 200)
        headers = result.get("headers", {})
        body_out = result.get("body", "")
        is_b64  = result.get("isBase64Encoded", False)

        self.send_response(status)
        for k, v in headers.items():
            self.send_header(k, v)
        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")

        if is_b64:
            import base64
            raw = base64.b64decode(body_out)
            self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(raw)))
            self.end_headers()
            self.wfile.write(raw)
        else:
            encoded = body_out.encode("utf-8") if isinstance(body_out, str) else body_out
            self.send_header("Content-Length", str(len(encoded)))
            self.end_headers()
            self.wfile.write(encoded)

    def do_OPTIONS(self):
        self.send_response(200)
        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Origin", "*")
        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Methods", "POST, GET, OPTIONS")
        self.send_header("Access-Control-Allow-Headers", "Content-Type")
        self.end_headers()


# в”Җв”Җ Main в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ

if __name__ == "__main__":
    PORT = int(os.environ.get("PORT", 8888))
    server = HTTPServer(("localhost", PORT), Handler)
    print(f"\n{'='*52}")
    print(f"  Steel Structure Design вҖ” Local Server")
    print(f"  http://localhost:{PORT}")
    print(f"  аёҒаё” Ctrl+C а№Җаёһаё·а№Ҳаёӯаё«аёўаёёаё”")
    print(f"{'='*52}\n")
    try:
        server.serve_forever()
    except KeyboardInterrupt:
        print("\nServer stopped.")

Updated main_app.py: - Replaced raw reportlab imports with report_generator imports - Added result storage after calculation: self._beam_result, self._beam_section_name, self._beam_span - Added self._column_result, self._column_section_name, self._column_height - Added "Export PDF аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аёіаёҷаё§аё“" button to beam and column button frames (conditional on REPORTLAB_AVAILABLE) - Added _collect_project_info() dialog method: Toplevel with 6 entry fields, OK/Cancel buttons - Added export_beam_pdf() and export_column_pdf() methods with filedialog 5. Created netlify/functions/export_pdf.py: - POST /api/export-pdf handler - Reconstructs design from JSON input data, calls generate_beam/column_report - Returns base64-encoded PDF with isBase64Encoded: True 6. Updated public/index.html exportPDF(): - Now async, calls _promptProjectInfo() modal first - POSTs to /api/export-pdf - Downloads PDF blob automatically - Falls back to window.print() if API unavailable 7. Added _promptProjectInfo() function in JS: creates overlay modal with 5 input fields 8. Tests passed: Beam PDF 85KB, Column PDF 82KB, Combined PDF 90KB ## Request 7: Fix API URL error User got error: "а№ҖаёҠаё·а№ҲаёӯаёЎаё•а№Ҳаёӯ API а№„аёЎа№Ҳа№„аё”а№ү: Failed to execute 'fetch' on 'Window': Failed to parse URL from /.netlify/functions/calculate" ### Root cause: index.html opened as file:// URL вҶ’ relative URL /.netlify/functions/calculate can't be resolved ### What was done: 1. Fixed API URL detection in index.html: ```javascript const _proto = window.location.protocol; const _host = window.location.hostname; const API = (_proto === 'file:') ? 'http://localhost:8888/api/calculate' : (_host === 'localhost' || _host === '127.0.0.1') ? `${window.location.origin}/api/calculate` : '/.netlify/functions/calculate'; const API_PDF = (_proto === 'file:') ? 'http://localhost:8888/api/export-pdf' : (_host === 'localhost' || _host === '127.0.0.1') ? `${window.location.origin}/api/export-pdf` : '/api/export-pdf'; ``` 2. Fixed fetch('/api/export-pdf', ...) вҶ’ fetch(API_PDF, ...) 3. Created local_server.py: - HTTPServer on port 8888 (configurable via PORT env var) - Serves static files from public/ directory - Routes POST /api/calculate and /.netlify/functions/calculate вҶ’ _calc_handler - Routes POST /api/export-pdf and /.netlify/functions/export_pdf вҶ’ _pdf_handler - Handles CORS OPTIONS requests - Handles base64-encoded binary responses (for PDF) ## Current State - Last committed: 68de520 (Report Generator) - local_server.py created but NOT yet committed - API URL fix in index.html NOT yet committed - The conversation ends after the edit to fix fetch(API_PDF) and the creation of local_server.py 1. Primary Request and Intent: - **Engineering Data Structure**: Build 3 core components: Section & Material Database (RHS/SHS box sections), LRFD Design Codes (AISC 360-16), and a Matrix Stiffness Method calculation engine - **Commits for PR**: Commit all changes and prepare for pull request to `main` branch (requested multiple times) - **Material Design Icons**: Clone `google/material-design-icons`, select icons for the steel design app, integrate into both web frontend and Tkinter app - **Report Generator**: Create a professional PDF export system (аёЈаёІаёўаёҒаёІаёЈаё„аёіаёҷаё§аё“) for building permit submissions, showing formulas, variables, and results with Thai language support - **Fix API URL Error**: Fix "Failed to parse URL from /.netlify/functions/calculate" when `index.html` is opened as `file://` URL 2. Key Technical Concepts: - **Steel sections**: TIS 1227/1228, RHS/SHS box sections, H-Beam, I-Beam, C-Channel - **Design codes**: ASD (аё§аёӘаё—. 011038-22), LRFD (AISC 360-16), LTB (Lateral-Torsional Buckling F2), section compactness classification (Table B4.1b), combined loading H1-1 - **Matrix Stiffness Method**: 2D frame, 6-DOF beam-column elements, transformation matrix, global assembly, numpy.linalg.solve, fixed-end forces - **reportlab**: A4 PDF with Thai Unicode fonts (ARIALUNI.ttf), BaseDocTemplate, custom Flowables, TableStyle, ParagraphStyle - **Material Symbols Outlined**: Google Fonts CDN + local SVG fallback, font-variation-settings - **Netlify serverless functions**: Python handlers, base64 binary responses, `isBase64Encoded` - **Local dev server**: Python HTTPServer serving `public/` static files + proxying to Python function handlers - **Git sparse checkout**: `--filter=blob:none --sparse` to clone only specific icon folders 3. Files and Code Sections: - **`steel_sections.py`** вҖ” Added `RHS_SECTIONS` dict with 26 SHS/RHS sections (TIS 1228). Already had C_CHANNELS, H_BEAMS, I_BEAMS, EQUAL_ANGLES, UNEQUAL_ANGLES, STEEL_PIPES, STEEL_MATERIALS (SS400/SM490/SM520/SS540), BOLTS, WELDS, STEEL_PLATES, SteelSection dataclass. - **`design_codes.py`** (new) вҖ” Full LRFD AISC 360-16 implementation: ```python def classify_section(sec: SteelSection, Fy=None) -> SectionClass # Table B4.1b def calc_ltb(sec, Lb, Cb=1.0, Fy=None) -> LTBResult # F2: Lp, Lr, zones def calc_Cb(M1, M2, M3, Mmax) -> float # F1-1 def calc_beam_capacity_lrfd(sec, Lb, Cb=1.0, Fy=None) -> BeamCapacityLRFD # ПҶMn, ПҶVn def calc_column_capacity_lrfd(sec, height, Kx, Ky, Fy=None) -> ColumnCapacityLRFD # ПҶPn E3 def check_combined_lrfd(sec, Pu, Mux, Muy, phi_Pn, phi_Mnx, phi_Mny) -> CombinedCheckLRFD # H1-1 def calc_tension_lrfd(sec, Ae=None) -> dict # D2 def asd_allowable_bending/shear/compression(...) # ASD helpers ``` PHI_b=0.90, PHI_v=1.00, PHI_c=0.90. rts computed via `sqrt(sqrt(Iy*Cw)/Sx)`. - **`structural_analysis.py`** (new) вҖ” Matrix Stiffness Method 2D frame: ```python @dataclass class Node(id, x, y, fix_u, fix_v, fix_theta) # dofs вҶ’ (id*3, id*3+1, id*3+2) @dataclass class Section2D(A, I, E=200000) @dataclass class Element(id, node_i, node_j, section, q_local_x, q_local_y) .local_stiffness() вҶ’ 6Г—6 ndarray # EA/L, 12EI/LВі, 6EI/LВІ, 4EI/L, 2EI/L .transformation_matrix() вҶ’ 6Г—6 T # rotation by element angle .global_stiffness() вҶ’ T.T @ k @ T .fixed_end_forces_local/global() # UDL вҶ’ FEF class Structure2D: .add_node(), .add_element(), .add_point_load() .analyze() вҶ’ AnalysisResult # assemble вҶ’ partition вҶ’ np.linalg.solve вҶ’ recover def simply_supported_beam(...), def portal_frame(...) # convenience builders ``` - **`main_app.py`** вҖ” Updated imports (report_generator instead of raw reportlab), added result storage (`self._beam_result`, `self._beam_section_name`, `self._beam_span`, `self._column_result`, etc.), added PDF export buttons, `_collect_project_info()` Toplevel dialog, `export_beam_pdf()`, `export_column_pdf()` methods, imported `RHS_SECTIONS`. - **`beam_design.py`** вҖ” Added `properties` dict to `result.details` storing `Fy` and `Sx`; fixed `format_beam_report` to read from `details["properties"]`. - **`column_design.py`** вҖ” Added `properties` dict storing `A`, `rx`, `ry`; fixed `format_column_report` to read from `details["properties"]`. - **`icons_tk.py`** (new) вҖ” Tkinter icon loader using PIL: ```python def get_icon(name, size=20, color='#1b4f72') -> ImageTk.PhotoImage def get_icon_pass/fail/warn() -> ImageTk.PhotoImage TAB_ICONS = {'purlin':'architecture','beam':'straighten','column':'layers',...} SECTION_ICONS = {'calculate':'calculate','pdf':'picture_as_pdf',...} ``` Reads SVGs from `public/icons/`, parses path commands (M/L/H/V/C/Q/A/Z), renders with PIL RGBA, caches results. - **`public/icons/`** (new) вҖ” 20 SVG files (24px outlined) copied from `C:/Code_design/material-design-icons/symbols/web/*/materialsymbolsoutlined/*_24px.svg` - **`report_generator.py`** (new, ~500 lines) вҖ” Professional PDF reports: ```python @dataclass class ProjectInfo(project_name, project_no, engineer, checker, date, standard, method, client, location) class _ReportDoc(BaseDocTemplate) # A4, header/footer every page, page numbers class _SectionHeader(Flowable) # navy banner class _SubHeader(Flowable) # accent strip class _PassFailBanner(Flowable) # large PASS/FAIL result banner def _formula_table(rows) вҶ’ Table # 4 cols: variable | formula | substitution | result def _section_props_table(props) вҶ’ Table def _load_combo_table(...) вҶ’ Table # with pass/fail row coloring def generate_beam_report(result, section_name, span, project, output_path) вҶ’ bytes def generate_column_report(result, section_name, height, project, output_path) вҶ’ bytes def generate_combined_report(modules, project, output_path) вҶ’ bytes ``` Uses ArialUni (ARIALUNI.ttf) for Thai text. Cover page + 5-6 calculation sections per member. - **`netlify/functions/export_pdf.py`** (new) вҖ” Netlify serverless function for PDF: Reconstructs design from POST JSON `{module, data, project}`, calls report_generator, returns base64 PDF with `isBase64Encoded: True`. - **`public/index.html`** вҖ” Major updates: - Added Material Symbols Outlined CDN link - Added CSS: `.material-symbols-outlined`, `.icon-pass/fail/warn`, tab button flex layout, `.btn-icon` - Header: `engineering` - Tab buttons: architecture, straighten, layers, build, construction icons - Calculate/Find/PDF buttons: calculate, table_view, picture_as_pdf icons - Badges: check_circle/cancel icons (filled, colored) - `exportPDF()`: async, calls `_promptProjectInfo()` modal, POSTs to `API_PDF`, downloads blob - `_promptProjectInfo()`: overlay modal with 5 project info fields - **API URL fix** (most recent): ```javascript const _proto = window.location.protocol; const _host = window.location.hostname; const API = (_proto === 'file:') ? 'http://localhost:8888/api/calculate' : (_host === 'localhost' || _host === '127.0.0.1') ? `${window.location.origin}/api/calculate` : '/.netlify/functions/calculate'; const API_PDF = (_proto === 'file:') ? 'http://localhost:8888/api/export-pdf' : (_host === 'localhost' || _host === '127.0.0.1') ? `${window.location.origin}/api/export-pdf` : '/api/export-pdf'; ``` - Changed `fetch('/api/export-pdf', ...)` вҶ’ `fetch(API_PDF, ...)` - **`local_server.py`** (new) вҖ” Local development server: ```python class Handler(SimpleHTTPRequestHandler): # serves public/ as static root # POST /api/calculate вҶ’ _calc_handler (netlify/functions/calculate.py) # POST /api/export-pdf вҶ’ _pdf_handler (netlify/functions/export_pdf.py) # handles isBase64Encoded responses (PDF binary) # CORS OPTIONS support # HTTPServer on localhost:8888 (PORT env var) ``` - **`setup_and_run.bat`** вҖ” Windows batch script: creates .venv, pip install -r requirements.txt, python main_app.py - **`.github/.devcontainer/devcontainer.json`** вҖ” GitHub Codespaces configuration 4. Errors and Fixes: - **Git lock files during sparse checkout**: Background process from `git sparse-checkout set symbols/web && git checkout` created `.git/index.lock` and `.git/info/sparse-checkout.lock`. Fixed by: killing all git processes with `Get-Process git | Stop-Process -Force`, then `Get-ChildItem *.lock -Recurse | Remove-Item -Force`. - **symbols/web too large**: First sparse checkout target `symbols/web` would download ~5M files. Fixed by targeting only 20 specific icon paths instead. - **cairosvg not available**: Could not convert SVGs with cairosvg. Fixed by writing a custom SVG path parser in `icons_tk.py` using PIL. - **API URL parse error**: `fetch` failed with "Failed to parse URL from /.netlify/functions/calculate" because `index.html` was opened as `file://` URL. Fixed by adding environment detection (protocol/hostname) to set the correct API base URL dynamically. - **beam_design.py report showing wrong Fy/Sx**: Was computing Fy as `result.Fb / 0.66` (reverse-engineering). Fixed by storing actual values in `result.details["properties"]` during `check_beam()`. 5. Problem Solving: - **Thai font in PDF**: ARIALUNI.ttf (Arial Unicode MS) from `C:/Windows/Fonts/` successfully renders Thai text in reportlab. Verified with a test render producing 37KB PDF. - **Material Icons without downloading full repo**: Used `git sparse-checkout` with only 20 specific icon paths, reducing download from ~GB to a few MB. - **Netlify function returning binary PDF**: Used `isBase64Encoded: True` pattern with base64-encoded body; local_server.py decodes this and writes raw bytes. - **File:// URL API calls**: Three-tier URL detection (file://, localhost, production) ensures correct API endpoint in all environments. 6. All User Messages: - "аё§аёІаёҮа№Ӯаё„аёЈаёҮаёӘаёЈа№үаёІаёҮаёӮа№үаёӯаёЎаё№аёҘаё—аёІаёҮаё§аёҙаёЁаё§аёҒаёЈаёЈаёЎа№ғаё«а№үа№Ғаёҷа№ҲаёҷаёҒа№Ҳаёӯаёҷ: Section & Material Database, Design Codes Implementation, Calculation Engine (FEM/Matrix Method)" - "Please commit all of my changes so we can make a PR."
